content:
Thrilled to have participated in the webinar Copyright in the Digital Age: Social Media, Content Creation & Fair Use organised by Lex Saarthi

The session offered valuable insights into the evolving landscape of copyright law, fair use, and the legal challenges surrounding digital content creation in today's technology-driven world. It was an enriching opportunity to deepen my understanding of intellectual property rights and their practical relevance in the digital era.

As a law student, I believe that continuous learning beyond the classroom is essential for developing a well-rounded legal perspective. Looking forward to participating in more such insightful discussions.


SHIVANI GUPTA
